channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch  CNBC
  5. Rivian Cuts Hundreds of Jobs Days After Launching New EV Model  Bloomberg

item.title: The U.S. Economy Is Leaving These Companies Behind - The New York Times
item.description:
1. The U.S. Economy Is Leaving These Companies Behind  The New York Times
  2. US small business owners: how are you operating in the current economic climate?  The Guardian
  3. KNEB-AM 960 AM – 100.3 FM - May NFIB Small Business survey finds reduced optimism  Rural Radio Network
  4. Mom-and-Pop Businesses Face Devastating Crisis Under Trump  The Daily Beast
  5. Small Business Employment Index Declines for Third Consecutive Month  Carmichael Times
